attacking_style: Enters early breakaways but prioritizes team objectives over personal result. Willing to expend energy pacing on final climbs rather than pursuing stage victory.
team_tactics: Functions as a domestique within breakaway situations, using advanced position to pace GC leaders when they bridge across. AG2R deploys him in early moves with dual purpose.
terrain_preference: Climbs where he can set tempo from breakaways. Suited to mountain stages where early break tactics can assist protected riders.
vulnerability: Limited personal ambition in breakaways when team has GC interests. Unlikely to contend for wins when fulfilling domestique role.
key_patterns: Sacrifices personal result from breakaway to support GC teammates (Tour de Suisse 2023)
Paces protected riders on final climbs after establishing breakaway position early
AG2R uses him tactically in breaks to bridge gap for GC contenders
form_trajectory: unknown: single race observation shows tactical discipline but insufficient data for form assessment
